authors: Stauss T, El Majdoub F, Sayed D, Surges G, Rosenberg WS, Kapural L, Bundschu R, Lalkhen A, Patel N, Gliner B, Subbaroyan J, Rotte A, Edgar DR, Bettag M, Maarouf M
title: A multicenter real-world review of 10 kHz SCS outcomes for treatment of chronic trunk and/or limb pain
journal_name: Annals of Clinical and Translational Neurology
study_question: Evaluate real-world efficacy of 10 kHz HF-SCS for chronic trunk and/or limb pain.
population_assessed: 1660 patients with chronic trunk and/or limb pain, trialed/implanted with HF-SCS at 10 kHz.
outcome_measures: Responder rates (≥50% pain relief), function, sleep, quality of life, medication intake.
inclusion_criteria: Patients trialed and/or permanently implanted with HF-SCS at 10 kHz (April 2014-Jan 2018).
answer_to_study_question: Sustained and effective pain relief experienced by >70% of patients, with improved function, sleep, quality of life.
